titleStmt.title: CAPITVLA IOSVE in Tours' Octateuch (Tours, BM, 10)

editionStmt.edition: Digital Critical Edition of the Chapter Summaries (Capitula) to Iosue in the Tours' Octateuch (Tours, BM, 10)

publicationStmt.p:
Welcome to the digital critical edition project of the Capitula to the Octateuch in the Tours Bibles!
The editions are part of the PRIN 2022 PNRR project DOBiPS – Data Oriented Biblical Paratext Studies, awarded for the 2023–2025 period to the research units at the Universities of Udine (P.I. E. Colombi) and Cassino (P.I. R. Casavecchia), under the competitive PRIN PNRR call – National Recovery and Resilience Plan, Mission 4 "Education and Research", funded by the European Union’s NextGenerationEU programme (protocol no. P2022ZW4AW).
The Capitula prefixed to the Octateuch in the Tours Bibles have been encoded in XML/TEI and published using the software EVT (Edition Visualization Technology).
The editions were prepared by members of the Udine research unit: Emanuela Colombi, Margherita Filippozzi, and Silverio Franzoni.
Details of the encoding choices and related methodological reflections have been presented in the working paper: E. Colombi, M. Filippozzi, S. Franzoni, The Digital Critical Edition of the Capitula to the Octateuch in the Tours Bibles, DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.16761173.
Information on the individual editions is available by clicking the 'info' button at the top of the left-hand pane.

bibl.author: Donatien de Bruyne
bibl.title: Sommaires, divisions et rubriques de la Bible latine

bibl.author: Bernhard Bischoff
bibl.title: Katalog der festländischen Handschriften des neunten Jahrhunderts (mit Ausnahme der wisigotischen)

bibl.editor: Monachi abbatiae pontificiae Sancti Hieronymi in Urbe
bibl.title: Biblia Sacra iuxta Latinam vulgatam versionem ad codicum fidem... Libri Iosue Iudicum Ruth ex interpretatione sancti Hieronymi cum praefatione et variis capitulorum seriebus

supportDesc.extent:
II + 351 folios
height 352 mm width 260 mm

listWit.witness: Text of the A series as edited in the DOBiPS project (here)

tagsDecl.rendition: the digital reproduction is b/w, impossible to determine color

item.title: Promittit deus iosue dicens sicut fui cum moysen moyse ero et tecum

Iubet iosue populo populum populo ut praeparet sibi cibaria praeparare cibaria iubetur populo
et ut transeant iordanem ammonens etiam rubenetas et gadditas et dimidiam tribum manasse ut conlocantes familias suas in terram quam tradiderat tradiderit tradiderat eis moyses et praecederent armati sicut moyse promiserant
Mittuntur a iosue de sethim duo uiri exploratores Destinantur exploratores a iosue in hiericho quos recipiens domo raab meretrix celabit

Dixit promittit dominus ad
iosue
dicens
hodie incipiam exaltare te coram omni israhel
ut sciant quia The Vulgate (Ios 3.7) reads here quod instead of quia (no variant is recorded in Weber-Gryson's apparatus). sicut fui cum moyse
s
ita et tecum sum Cf. app. Weber-Gryson ad Ios 3.7 (ita et tecum sim): sim] sum CΣT (C = Cava, Badia, 1 (14), 9th c. 2/2, Spain; Σ = Madrid, BN, Vitr. 13-1, 10th c., Spain; T = our Tu).
Iubente domino siccauit alueus iordanis transeunte euntis See the note ad loc. in the edition of the A series. israhel

Duodecim electi lapides lapides electi Since the difference consists only in the transposition of two contiguous words, it may be an accidental error rather than the result of a conscious reworking.
leuati sunt
de iordanis alueo a duodecim uiris de duodecim tribubus quos posuit iosue in galgalis
pro commemoratione ob commemorationem futuri
temporis reuersusque est fluuius ad cursum suum et ascendit populus de iordanne decimo mensis prima die
Introeunte israhel terram chanaan territi sunt cuncti reges
Haec autem causa est secundae circumcisionis

bibl.title: Iosue 5.9 dixitque Dominus ad Iosue (series A: 5.12 defecitque manna)

item.title: Hucusque comederunt manna
Ostendit se angelus domini iosue qui dixit princeps exercitus domini sum
De obsidione uel subuersione muri hiericho
Inpraecatio iosue
Praeuaricatio populi
Confortat dominus iosue ad proeliandum
Perturbatio regum
Simulatio gabaonitarum
Conglobati quinque reges contra iosue ascenderunt tunc imperauit soli et stetit spatium diei unius
Iuuante domino extincti sunt reges cum exercitu suo
Ruben gad et dimidiae tribui tribu? tribui manasse terram sibi dari postulantes a moyse
Hii hi sunt reges terrae quos percussit iosue et filii israhel

bibl.title: Iosue 13.1 Iosue senex provectaeque (series A: 13.6 ego sum qui)

item.title: Diuidere terras populis hortatur dominus iosue
Promissum repetit chaleb montem in quo hebron hic legis adam situm

app.lem: Possessio filiorum iudae per sortem et quia gebuseum habitatorem hierusalem non potuerunt filii iuda delere sed habitauit cum eis usque in presentem diem

Possessio filiorum ioseph efraim et manasse per sortem et quia chananeum qui habitabat in gazer non potuerunt filii ephraim delere sed habitauit cum eis usque in presentem diem tributarius et quia filiabus salphaad dedit iosue possessionem iuxta imperium domini in medio fratrum patris earum
app.rdg: sors filiorum ioseph ephraim et manasse

item.title: Filii ioseph petent petunt Note that the erroneous petent also occurs in Am2, thus suggesting a possible relationship between the two witnesses, or at least indicating that it is an ancient error. sibi augmentari funiculum a iosue quibus ait ascendite in montem et succidite siluam et mundate uobis ad habitandum spatia
Congregatique sunt omnes filii israhel in silo

Destinantur uiri uir* uir ad discribendam describendam terram reuersique discriptionem descriptionem tradunt iosue qui misit sortes coram domino in silo diuisitque terram filiis israhel in
septem partes

bibl.title: Iosue 20.1 et locutus est dominus (series A: 20.1 loquere filiis)

item.title: Urbes fugitiuorum

bibl.title: Iosue 21.1 accesseruntque principes (series A: 21.2 locutique sunt ad eos)

item.title: Urbes leuitarum
Post bellorum turbines data est et requies a domino
Inconsulta re facta a tribu ruben altare inmense inmensae magnitudinis
Replicat a principio iosue cuncta israheli cum obtestatione ne discedant a praeceptis domini adpropinquante die obitus sui
Unde natus sit abraham uel ubi perductus item congregatis cum pacto obtestationis adloquitur eos iosue

bibl.title: Iosue ? (this capitulum has no corresponding chapter number throughout the text of Iosue in Tu; it should probably have fallen around Ios 24.22)

app.lem: Congregatum israhel iosue sub pacto obtestationis adloquitur et scribens uerba sua in uolumine tulit lapidem grandem et posuit eum supter quercum in testimonio

bibl.title: Iosue 24.29 et post haec mortuus est Iosue

app.lem: Mortuus est iosue centum decem annorum et sepultus est in possessione sua in monte ephraim ossa quoque ioseph quae tulerant filii israhel de aegypto sepelierunt in sichem in partem agri quem emerat iacob a filiis emmor centum nouellis ouibus nam et eleazar filius aaron mortuus est et sepelierunt eum in gabaath in monte efraim
